attributes.description: FDC (Fairdeal Corporation) Ltd Limited (found in 1936) is among India’s leading fully integrated pharmaceutical companies. The Company is a pioneer in the manufacture of specialized formulations, and among the world’s foremost manufacturers and marketers of Oral Rehydration Salts (ORS). Some of FDC’s leading brands in India include Zifi, Electral, Enerzal, Vitcofol, Pyrimon, Zocon, Zathrin, Zipod, Cotaryl and Mycoderm in the domestic and international markets.[1]

FDC (Fairdeal Corporation) Ltd Limited (found in 1936) is among India’s leading fully integrated pharmaceutical companies. The Company is a pioneer in the manufacture of specialized formulations, and among the world’s foremost manufacturers and marketers of Oral Rehydration Salts (ORS). Some of FDC’s leading brands in India include Zifi, Electral, Enerzal, Vitcofol, Pyrimon, Zocon, Zathrin, Zipod, Cotaryl and Mycoderm in the domestic and international markets.[1]
